title: Everlasting Moon
description: Permanent Night, New Biomes, Huge Caves, Don't Die.
body:
**Everlasting Moon** plunges you into a Minecraft world where the sun never rises! The sky is forever cloaked in twilight, casting a mysterious glow over an ever-changing landscape. With a stunning variety of vibrant colors and new, nocturnal creatures roaming the darkness, this isn’t your typical survival experience—it’s an adventure in a world that never sleeps!

Team up with friends using the **Voice Chat Mod** to strategize and survive the perils of the eternal night, while the **Essentials Mod** makes multiplayer smooth and fun, letting you teleport, set homes, and more. Every corner of this moonlit realm holds secrets, danger, and beauty waiting to be discovered.

Prepare yourself for a survival journey unlike any other, where the night is everlasting, but the adventure never ends in **Everlasting Moon**!
